relations.note: Mandatory bold targets operate within the per-section bold budget.
Emphasis stacking limit constrains how bold combines with other devices.

quotes: Per email section, bold at most: the heading(s), one key phrase or claim per paragraph, and the statistical callout figure.
Bold is for **hierarchy and key takeaways, not decoration**.
Never bold: entire paragraphs, footnotes/references, more than ~15% of running body text in any section, prepositional filler, the generic name.

rules.intent: Keep bold reserved for genuine hierarchy and key takeaways rather than decoration.
rules.rule_text: Bold is for hierarchy and key takeaways, not decoration. Per email section, bold at most: the heading(s), one key phrase or claim per paragraph, and the statistical callout figure. Never bold entire paragraphs, footnotes/references, more than ~15% of running body text in any section, prepositional filler, or the generic name.

quotes: Always bold: callout text per the callout specs (§1.7), statistical callout numbers, brand name within a benefit claim when it is the focal point of the sentence (first instance per section only).
Always bold: callout text per the callout specs (§1.7), statistical callout numbers, brand name within a benefit claim when it is the focal point of the sentence (first instance per section only).

rules.intent: Guarantee emphasis on the callout copy, key figures, and focal brand claim.
rules.rule_text: Always bold: callout text per the callout specs (callout.text.weight = bold), statistical callout numbers (chart.statistical_callout.figure.weight = large and bold), and the brand name within a benefit claim when it is the focal point of the sentence — first instance per section only.

quotes: Pick at most two emphasis devices per element.
Never use bold + ALL CAPS + color emphasis simultaneously on the same string except in chart headlines and the campaign headline lockup. Pick at most two emphasis devices per element.

rules.intent: Prevent over-emphasized strings by capping stacked emphasis devices.
rules.rule_text: Never use bold + ALL CAPS + color emphasis simultaneously on the same string, except in chart headlines and the campaign headline lockup. Pick at most two emphasis devices per element.

effect.reserved_for: real hyperlinks (underline); study names, notes, and citations (italic)
effect.subject: underline_and_italic

quotes: No underlining except real hyperlinks. No italic for emphasis in patient copy — reserve italics for study names, notes ("Note:"), and citations.
No underlining except real hyperlinks. No italic for emphasis in patient copy — reserve italics for study names, notes ("Note:"), and citations.

rules.intent: Reserve underline for links and italics for study names/notes/citations to avoid ambiguous emphasis.
rules.rule_text: No underlining except on real hyperlinks (body.link.decoration = underline). No italic for emphasis in patient copy — reserve italics for study names, notes ("Note:"), and citations.
